inventorypets.configuration.frequencyNet: Adjust the spawning frequency of Nether Dungeons, where 1 is less frequent and 10 is more frequent.
inventorypets.configuration.frequencySea: Adjust the spawning frequency of the Sea Cave Dungeons, where 1 is less frequent and 10 is more frequent.
inventorypets.configuration.frequencySky: Adjust the spawning frequency of the Sky Dungeons, where 1 is less frequent and 10 is more frequent.
inventorypets.configuration.frequencySpa: Frequency of the spawning of Space Dungeons, where 1 is less frequent and 10 is more frequent.
inventorypets.configuration.frequencyTre: Frequency of the spawning of Tree Tops, where 1 is less frequent and 10 is more frequent.
inventorypets.configuration.frequencyUnd: Adjust the spawning frequency of Underground Dungeons.
inventorypets.configuration.holidayPetMo: Adjust the month the Holiday Pets and gifts are active.
inventorypets.configuration.illuminatiCo: The amount of time in minutes it takes the Illuminati Pet to cool down.
inventorypets.configuration.illuminatiCr: Restrict the Illuminati ability to spawn crafted items only.
inventorypets.configuration.illuminatiIn: Adjust the duration of the Illuminati invisibility, in minutes.
inventorypets.configuration.illuminatiIt: Adjust the upper limit of items the Illuminati will randomly look through, sometimes needed for larger modpacks.
inventorypets.configuration.juggernautCo: Disable the abilities of the Juggernaut Pet
inventorypets.configuration.juggernautSh: Adjust the duration of the Juggernaut's Shield Wall ability, in minutes.
inventorypets.configuration.pacManEatLev: Adjust the threshold when the Pac-Mac Pet auto-eats
inventorypets.configuration.pacManPoweru: Adjust the damage factor increase of the Pac-Man pet.
inventorypets.configuration.petEatTimerF: Adjust the timing for Pets that eat on a timer, where 120 is approximately half of a Minecraft day.
inventorypets.configuration.petsEatWhole: Require all Pets to eat harder-to-find items.
Require that Pets must eat to provide abilities.
inventorypets.configuration.reduceQuantu: Reduce the number of Quantum Crystal Monster minions from 3 to 2
inventorypets.configuration.showHolidayM: Show Inventory Pets Holiday Messages on game start.
inventorypets.configuration.showSuggesto: Display the names of the fan-suggested Pets in the tooltip.
inventorypets.configuration.showUpdateMe: Display the Inventory Pets update message on game start when a new version is available.
inventorypets.configuration.spongeAbsorb: Radius of the amount of water the Sponge Pet absorbs.
inventorypets.configuration.title: Inventory Pets Configuration Title
inventorypets.configuration.yearroundApr: Allow the April Fool Pet to be used all year.
